ar_title: دعاء في زمن الغيبة (اللهم كن لوليك)
en_title: Dua during the Occultation (Allāhumma kun li-waliyyik)

verses.ar: اللّهُمّ كُنْ لِوَلِيّكَ الحُجّةِ ابْنِ الحَسَنِ
verses.en: O Allah, be, for Your representative, the Hujjat (proof), son of Al­Hassan,
Your blessings be on him and his forefathers,

verses.ar: فِي هذِهِ السَّاعَةِ وَفي كُلّ سَاعَةٍ
verses.en: in this hour and in every hour,
until You make him live on the earth, in obedience (to You),& Cause him to live in it for a long time</h6
